arts.ttl: Edoardo Bove collapses: Inter v Fiorentina match abandoned amid awful scenes
arts.sum: Players from both sides were left visibly upset after the midfielder collapsed on the pitch

arts.ttl: Fiorentina’s Edoardo Bove taken to hospital after collapsing on pitch
arts.sum: Serie A match suspended as Bove treated by paramedics Players form protective barrier around 22-year-old Fiorentina midfielder Edoardo Bove was taken off the pitch in an ambulance after collapsing shortly after the start of their Serie A match against Internazionale. Sky Sport Italia reported that Bove was transported to the Careggi Hospital near the Stadio Franchi in Florence and that he was breathing on his own, though had not yet regained consciousness. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Fiorentina v Inter abandoned after Bove collapse
arts.sum: Fiorentina midfielder Edoardo Bove has been taken to hospital after collapsing on the pitch during his side's Serie A match against Inter Milan on Sunday, which was later abandoned.

arts.ttl: Fiorentina vs Inter abandoned after player collapses on pitch
arts.sum: Fiorentina vs Inter was abandoned after midfielder Edoardo Bove collapsed on the pitch.

arts.ttl: David de Gea issues Edoardo Bove statement after team-mate collapses during game
arts.sum: Former Manchester United star David de Gea was playing for Fiorentina against Inter Milan when his team-mate Edoardo Bove collapsed and had to be rushed to hospital

arts.ttl: Bove regains consciousness: Fiorentina vs. Inter abandoned after medical emergency
arts.sum: Edoardo Bove is in hospital and has regained consciousness after a medical emergency, as the...

arts.ttl: Shock in Italy: Fiorentina's Bove collapses in match against Inter
arts.sum: Fiorentina player Edoardo Bove collapsed unconscious on the pitch in the 17th minute of the match against Inter Milan. Medical services quickly entered the field to attend to him and the players formed a circle around him to prevent their teammate from being seen .
Fiorentina midfielder Edoardo Bove was taken off the pitch in an ambulance after collapsing shortly after the start of their Serie A match against Inter Milan on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Fiorentina game with Inter abandoned after Bove collapses on pitch
arts.sum: Fiorentina midfielder Edoardo Bove collapsed on the pitch during the Serie A match at home to Inter Milan, with the game abandoned shortly afterwards.

arts.ttl: Fiorentina v Inter suspended after Bove collapse
arts.sum: Fiorentina midfielder Edoardo Bove collapsed and taken to hospital as a Serie A match against Inter Milan was suspended on Sunday.
